name: Peaches and Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups fresh peaches, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced peaches with sugar, spices, and tapioca in a bowl.
2. Place the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
3. Pour half and half over the fruit filling until the shell is three-quarters full.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
5. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for 45-50 more minutes, or until set.
6. Serve hot or warm.
